tldr: Replace Baremetrics' Stripe-derived SaaS metrics with Avo's analytics governance — note these tools serve different purposes and you may still need a metrics layer.
why_switch: Avo focuses on event schema governance, useful if product analytics matter more than revenue dashboards
Baremetrics is tightly coupled to Stripe data; Avo decouples tracking from any single source
Avo has a freemium tier vs. Baremetrics' $129/mo entry price
If product event quality is the actual problem, Avo addresses it; Baremetrics doesn't
Tracking plan discipline pays off across teams beyond just SaaS finance metrics
what_to_export: Stripe connection and any synced billing data references
Customer property schema (plan, segment, country, etc.)
Historical metric snapshots if you need an archive
export_method: Pull historical metric data and configurations via Baremetrics' export options or its API; document key metric definitions manually. For the underlying revenue truth, your Stripe (or other billing) data remains the source — keep that connection regardless of destination.
import_method: Create an Avo workspace and define a tracking plan focused on product events that matter. Connect Avo to your analytics destination(s) and integrate Avo's tooling per the official docs. Note that Avo is not a SaaS-metrics dashboard — if you still need MRR/churn views, plan a separate metrics layer (warehouse + BI, or another SaaS-metrics tool).

concept_mapping.target: Stored in destination tool or separately

effort: 1-3 weeks (longer if also standing up a separate metrics layer)
gotchas: Avo is not a Baremetrics replacement for revenue dashboards — different categories
Don't lose Stripe historical context; export before canceling
Plan for a separate BI/metrics tool if SaaS finance views matter
Tracking plan migrations require engineering effort to instrument
Verify Baremetrics contract terms and cancellation timing
Communicate clearly with finance/ops who rely on Baremetrics dashboards

email.subject: Moving off Baremetrics — restructuring our analytics stack
email.body:
Team,

We're sunsetting Baremetrics and moving product analytics governance to Avo. Note these are different categories of tools — Avo enforces event schema, it does not replace SaaS revenue dashboards.

For revenue/MRR/churn, we'll keep Stripe as the source of truth and decide separately on a BI or metrics layer. I'll export Baremetrics dashboards and metric definitions before we cancel.

Let me know which Baremetrics views you rely on so we plan replacements.

Thanks
